pre_game.message: Hey, I’m G. This whole setup is a little nerve-wracking, isn’t it? I’m just trying to get to know a few people before things get started—how are you holding up?
Hey G, I'm H. It’s definitely a bit intense, but I’m holding up okay. Just trying to stay focused on the goal. How are you feeling about the game?
I’m feeling pretty determined. I’ve got people back home counting on me, so I’m trying to stay sharp. What’s your motivation for being here?
Same here. I’ve got family counting on me too, and I’m determined to bring home enough to really help them out. It’s what’s keeping me focused.
I respect that. It definitely makes the stakes feel higher when it’s not just for ourselves. Do you have a strategy in mind for when the game actually starts?
Honestly, I’m still playing it by ear. I think a lot depends on how everyone else acts once the money is actually on the table. What about you—do you have a specific plan?
I’m hoping for some level of cooperation since we both have people counting on us, but I’m definitely keeping my guard up until I see how everyone else plays it.
I get that completely. It’s a tough balance between wanting to work together and needing to look out for your own people, so I’m right there with you on being careful.
Exactly. It's good to find some common ground. Have you picked up on any vibes from the rest of the group yet?
Everyone seems pretty guarded so far. It’s hard to tell who’s actually going to be a team player and who’s just waiting to make a move once the money's on the line.
For sure. I guess everyone's true colors will show once the clock starts. I'm glad we're on the same page about family, at least. Good luck to you.

post_game.message: Perfect coordination! Glad we all took the fair share.
It was a pleasure. I'm glad we could reach a fair outcome together.
